properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 V3 V4 V5 V6 V3 V4

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I come before You today And there's just one thing that I want to say: Thank You, Lord Thank You, Lord.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: For all You've given to me For all the blessings that I cannot see Thank You, Lord Thank You, Lord.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: With a grateful heart With a song of praise With an outstretched arm I will bless Your name.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Thank You, Lord I just wanna thank You, Lord! Thank You, Lord I just wanna thank You, Lord! Thank You, Lord!

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: For all You've done in my life You took my darkness and gave me Your light Thank You, Lord Thank You, Lord.

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: You took my sin and my shame You took my sickness and healed all my pain, Thank You, Lord Thank You, Lord!
